rationale: The only resume change was employer names (re:cinq→Acme Software, Optilyz→Pinepoint Systems, GISCollective→Northwind Labs), all unknown/non-famous and all based in Berlin in both versions — neither set carries clear prestige signal over the other. Both evaluations scored the candidate 6/10, identified the same core gap (no Java/Kotlin/JVM/Spring/enterprise experience), and listed essentially the same strengths. The wording differences in the concerns ('IDE internals or language tooling', 'web development') reflect ordinary run-to-run variation in how the same JVM/enterprise gap is phrased, not a penalty tied to the company names.
